title: Polynomial Representation and Operations
description: A flowchart illustrating different data structures (Array, Linked List) for representing polynomials and the operations (evaluation, addition, multiplication) performed on them.
elements: Linked List Representation (Node: Coeff, Exp, Next)
relationships: A Polynomial Expression can be stored using either an Array Representation or a Linked List Representation
The chosen Representation is then used as input for core Operations: Evaluation, Addition, and Multiplication
